bb_pctb.note: Values outside 0-1 are normal during breakouts; only flag truly extreme values

_comments.bb_pctb: Widened from [-0.5, 1.5]: values in [-1.0,-0.5] and [1.5,2.0] are legitimate breakout behavior
_comments.ema_stuck_days_threshold: Flag an EMA as stuck (computation error) if it has the same value for this many consecutive trading days
_comments.weekly_volume_min_ratio: Flag a week only if its volume is below this fraction of (trading_days × local_avg_daily_volume); the reference average uses a rolling ±42-day window (~60 trading days) so early low-volume tickers aren't compared against inflated all-time averages
_comments.warmup_rows: Rows per ticker to skip at the start of range checks (ta library warm-up period)
